title: GrapheneOS cites Hyundai, Kia as it pressures Volkswagen over app block
abstract: Is it getting to you that car manufacturers focus only on selling cars and not their services? GrapheneOS is now going after Hyundai and Kia, showing what truly putting customers first looks like. This time, they're targeting Volkswagen's app block issue, heating up the battle. This move has really got the auto giants on edge!
abstract_zh: 你是不是觉得汽车制造商只管卖车不管服务？GrapheneOS 现在就拿 Hyundai、Kia 开刀，要你看看什么叫真·客户至上！这回是瞄准了 Volkswagen 的应用权限问题，直接把这场battle拉满。这波操作，真是让车企们坐立不安啊！
